prompt: Safari is open on https://www.apple.com. Bookmark this page into a bookmarks folder named 'KinBench' (create the folder if it doesn't exist; or cerebellum 'safari bookmark_in_folder https://www.apple.com Apple-Bench KinBench ~/Desktop/kinbench/101-bookmark-folder-confirm.txt' which does both). Then write 'kinbench folder + apple.com bookmark' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/101-bookmark-folder-confirm.txt.
